case_title: YU JASON VS QUAN VIRGINIA M et al

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN VIRGINIA M HOME BUILDERS SUPPLY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUAN VIRGINIA M HOME BUILDERS SUPPLY $2,030.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,066.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
